response.justification: The candidate has strong software engineering fundamentals, extensive full-stack experience, and demonstrable passion for clean code and mentoring, but lacks focused, recent C++ experience in industrial automation or secure embedded systems — key requirements for this role. While they have legacy C++ exposure via NI LabWindows, it’s dated and not tied to IoT, MQTT, IEC 62443, or cloud-native industrial platforms.
strengths: Proven ability to deliver complex, scalable systems across diverse domains (GIS, IoT, real-time data)
Strong advocacy for testing, TDD, and software craftsmanship with public workshops and open-source contributions
Demonstrated leadership in mentoring and technical education through code katas and courses
concerns: Minimal recent C++ work; primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not aligned with core C++/STL requirement
No explicit experience with IEC 62443, MQTT, REST in industrial contexts, or secure development lifecycle for automation
Lack of demonstrated cloud platform (Azure) or industrial protocol (OPC UA, Modbus) exposure critical to the role
